Improving Application Security Team Perf.label: Improving BlackDuck Performance
content: Upgrading the application to modern stack to improve performance.
Improving scan times from 8+ hours to 10-15 minutes.
Implementing real-time API trigger for auto-scanning.

Leadership Development and Promotion.label: Professional Growth as VP and Expert Engineer
content: Participation in the Expert Engineer program for technical leadership training.
Leadership opportunities and visibility within JP.
Growing global team of cloud SREs.

Cloud Engineering and Management.label: Leadership and Development of Cloud Infrastructure
content: Leading APAC public cloud SRE team on AWS.
Mentoring global teams of LOB customers.
Developing self-service capabilities to reduce manual effort.

Chaos Engineering and Platform Enablemen.label: Chaos Studio Testing for AI/ML Use Cases
content: Enabling Chaos Studio on Azure to improve platform stability and availability.
Building end-to-end testing scripts using BDD Behavior Framework.
Testing capabilities increased from 20+ services to 80+, improving platform performance.

Continuous Compliance Environment Establ.label: Continuous Policy Validation for Cloud Assets
content: Developing a cohesive continuous compliance and validation pipeline
Centralized policy repository for easy management and update.
